title: It’s-a-hit: ‘The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ box office blasts off with $372.5 million globally
summary: Universal Pictures' Super Mario Galaxy sequel opened globally on Wednesday, capitalizing on spring break vacations and the Easter holiday period. The film has reached $372.5 million at the global box office, demonstrating strong demand for Nintendo-branded entertainment.
content: Universal Pictures released the sequel globally on Wednesday, capitalizing on kids' spring break vacations in the week leading up to the Easter holiday.

zh.title: 大热门：《超级马里奥银河电影》全球票房突破3.725亿美元
zh.summary: 环球影业的《超级马里奥银河》续集于周三全球上映，利用春假和复活节假期消费热潮。该电影全球票房已达3.725亿美元，展示了消费者对任天堂品牌娱乐的强劲需求。

title: Tesla is down sharply in 2026. JPMorgan sees the stock falling another 60%
summary: Tesla shares have declined sharply in 2026, and JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman warns investors to approach the stock with caution due to expected further downside. The bank's analysis suggests the stock could fall another 60% from current levels.
content: "We ... advise investors approach TSLA shares with a high degree of caution," analyst Ryan Brinkman said in a note.

zh.title: 特斯拉在2026年大幅下跌。摩根大通预计股价将再下跌60%
zh.summary: 特斯拉股票在2026年大幅下跌，摩根大通分析师瑞恩·布林克曼警告投资者谨慎对待该股票，预期将进一步下跌。该银行分析表明，股价可能从当前水平再下跌60%。

title: United Airlines wants even higher ticket prices. It’ll get them — with or without the Iran war.
summary: United Airlines is pursuing a luxury pricing strategy aimed at raising ticket prices, a risky bet given that fares are already high and customer complaints are mounting. The strategy's success depends on whether consumers accept premium pricing during a period of widespread fare frustration.
content: United’s new ‘luxury’ strategy is a risky bet for investors when fares and complaints are sky-high.

zh.title: 联合航空希望进一步提高票价。无论如何它都会实现——伊朗战争有无都无关
zh.summary: 联合航空正在实施奢侈定价战略以提高票价，这是一场有风险的赌注，因为票价已经很高，客户投诉不断增加。该战略的成功取决于消费者在广泛票价不满的时期是否愿意接受溢价。

title: Is the world running out of oil? Here are three ways Goldman Sachs is answering that critical question.
summary: Goldman Sachs analysts examined global oil supply trends through product supplies, price responses, and market anecdotes to assess whether the world is running short of oil. The analysis helps clarify a critical question for the global economy and energy markets.
content: Analysts led by Yulia Zhestkova Grigsby, a commodities strategist, looked at product supplies, price responses and anecdotes to address the issue of whether the global economy is running short of oil.

zh.title: 世界石油即将枯竭？高盛用三种方法回答这一关键问题
zh.summary: 高盛分析师通过产品供应、价格反应和市场轶事检视全球石油供应趋势,以评估世界是否面临石油短缺。这项分析有助于解答全球经济和能源市场面临的关键问题。

title: Neurocrine expands into metabolic diseases with $2.9 billion Soleno buyout
summary: Neurocrine Biotech is acquiring Soleno Therapeutics for $2.9 billion at $53 per share, a 34% premium to Soleno's previous closing price. The deal allows Neurocrine to expand into metabolic diseases and accelerate its obesity drug development pipeline.
content: Neurocrine has ⁠offered $53 per Soleno share held, which represents a premium of about 34% to the stock's last close.

zh.title: 纽罗泽制药以29亿美元收购Soleno进军代谢疾病领域
zh.summary: 纽罗泽制药公司以每股53美元收购Soleno疗法公司,总价29亿美元,较Soleno前一交易日收盘价溢价34%。此交易使纽罗泽制药得以进军代谢疾病领域,加快其肥胖症药物开发管道。

title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon's annual shareholder letter highlights significant risks across geopolitics, artificial intelligence, and private markets. Dimon also emphasized America's 250th anniversary and called for recommitment to foundational American ideals.
content: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.

zh.title: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙在年度信中指出地缘政治、人工智能和私募股权市场风险
zh.summary: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙的年度股东信强调了地缘政治、人工智能和私募股权市场面临的重大风险。戴蒙还强调了美国成立250周年,并呼吁重新致力于美国的基本理想。

title: Corporate insiders’ stock-market moves don’t match the headlines. Here’s what they’re seeing.
summary: Corporate insiders and directors are increasing their stock stakes despite the recent market selloff, suggesting they view current valuations as attractive. This pattern indicates executives believe the recent decline is temporary and expect recovery.
content: A key indicator shows officers and directors are actually increasing their stakes — betting that the recent selloff is temporary.

zh.title: 企业内部人士的股市举动与头条新闻不符。他们看到了什么？
zh.summary: 尽管最近市场下跌，企业内部人士和董事们仍在增加股份，这表明他们认为当前估值具有吸引力。这种模式表明高管们相信最近的下跌是暂时的，并期待反弹。

title: Google just sucker-punched these highflying tech stocks — don’t let the relief rally fool you
summary: Google's TurboQuant technology has disrupted the memory-chip market's dominance, fundamentally reshaping the investment thesis for AI hardware. The breakthrough undermines the previous assumption that specialized chip makers would dominate AI infrastructure.
content: Google’s TurboQuant cracks the memory-chip cartel — and the hardware-heavy AI thesis now looks like yesterday’s news.

zh.title: 谷歌刚刚给这些飙升的科技股来了一记重拳——别被反弹行情迷惑了
zh.summary: 谷歌的TurboQuant技术扰乱了内存芯片市场的主导地位，从根本上改变了人工智能硬件的投资论点。这一突破削弱了专业芯片制造商将主导人工智能基础设施的先前假设。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Netflix, Soleno Therapeutics, Strategy & more
summary: Multiple stocks are experiencing significant premarket trading moves, including Netflix, Soleno Therapeutics, and Strategy, reflecting overnight developments and earnings announcements. Premarket activity often signals the direction of broader market sentiment for the trading day.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Netflix、Soleno Therapeutics、Strategy等
zh.summary: 包括Netflix、Soleno Therapeutics和Strategy在内的多只股票正经历显著的盘前交易变动，反映了隔夜发展和财报公告。盘前活动通常预示着交易日更广泛的市场情绪方向。

title: Neurocrine wants to develop new obesity drugs. It’s making an acquisition to accelerate that move.
summary: Neurocrine Biotech is nearing a deal to acquire Soleno Therapeutics as part of its strategy to accelerate obesity drug development. Soleno's stock is surging in premarket trading following reports of the acquisition.
content: Soleno Therapeutics’ stock is soaring on Monday in premarket after a report that Neurocrine is nearing a deal to buy the company.

zh.title: 神经内分泌公司欲开发新型肥胖症药物，正通过并购加速推进
zh.summary: 神经内分泌生物技术公司正在接近与Soleno Therapeutics的交易，以加快肥胖症药物开发。收购消息公布后，Soleno股票在盘前交易中大幅上涨。

title: Netflix is a buy as subscription price hikes drive gains, says Goldman Sachs
summary: Goldman Sachs recommends Netflix as a buy following the company's recent subscription price increases, which are driving revenue gains. The bank believes Netflix shares are poised to move higher on the strength of pricing power.
content: Netflix are poised to go higher after the company recently raised its subscription prices, according to Goldman Sachs.

zh.title: 订阅价格上涨推动收益增长，高盛称Netflix值得买入
zh.summary: 在Netflix近期提高订阅价格后，高盛推荐该公司为买入，这些价格上涨正在推动收益增长。该银行认为Netflix股票有望因定价能力的增强而进一步上涨。

title: Crude oil dropping after historic $11 surge as negotiators race Trump’s deadline for Iran
summary: Crude oil prices fell on Monday after surging $11 historically, as negotiators race to meet President Trump's Tuesday deadline regarding Iran's Strait of Hormuz access. Trump threatened to attack Iran's power plants if it doesn't reopen the critical shipping channel.
content: Oil prices are falling on Monday after President Donald Trump threatened to knock out Iran’s power plants if it doesn’t reopen the Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday.

zh.title: 原油在创纪录的11美元升幅后下跌，谈判者争取赶上特朗普关于伊朗的截止日期
zh.summary: 周一原油价格下跌，此前创造了历史性的11美元涨幅。谈判代表正争取在特朗普关于伊朗霍尔木兹海峡的周二截止日期前达成协议。特朗普威胁，如果伊朗不重新开放这一关键航运通道，他将攻击伊朗的电力设施。

title: Is it unethical to use AI in my Airbnb photos to market my property to guests?
summary: A property owner questions the ethics of using AI-generated images to market their Airbnb rental, after struggling with traditional photography that shows signs of wear. The dilemma reflects broader questions about AI use in consumer marketing.
content: “No matter what I do, the beds still look a bit creased and worn, even grubby, in pictures.”

zh.title: 在Airbnb房源照片中使用AI来营销房产是否不道德？
zh.summary: 一位房产所有者在传统摄影效果不佳后，对使用AI生成的图像来营销Airbnb出租房产的道德性提出质疑。这一困境反映了关于在消费者营销中使用AI的更广泛问题。

title: ‘Our FICO score is excellent’: My husband and I are in our 70s. How do we raise $10,000 for a new roof?
summary: A couple in their 70s with an excellent FICO score seeks advice on raising $10,000 for a roof replacement while managing existing debt including a $30,000 home equity line of credit. Their strong credit profile provides multiple financing options for the repair.
content: “We currently have a home equity line of credit in the amount of $30,000 and a car loan of $15,000.”

zh.title: "我们的FICO分数很高"：我和丈夫都70多岁了，我们如何筹集1万美元来翻修屋顶？
zh.summary: 一对70多岁、FICO分数优异的夫妇寻求建议，希望在管理包括3万美元房屋净值信用额度在内的现有债务的同时，筹集1万美元用于屋顶更换。他们的强大信用档案为维修提供了多种融资选择。

title: India turns to Iran for oil and gas after 7-year hiatus, signaling limits to U.S. tilt
summary: India has resumed oil and gas imports from Iran after a seven-year hiatus, signaling a strategic rebalancing of its relationships and effort to secure supplies through the contested Strait of Hormuz. The move demonstrates limits to India's alignment with U.S. foreign policy.
content: India has resumed oil and gas imports from Iran after seven years, in a bid to rebalance its ties with Tehran and secure supplies through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 印度在中断7年后转向伊朗购买石油和天然气，暗示对美国立场的限制
zh.summary: 印度在中断7年后恢复从伊朗进口石油和天然气，表明其关系的战略重新平衡和通过争议的霍尔木兹海峡确保供应的努力。这一举措表明了印度与美国外交政策一致性的局限性。

title: 'Positives' for tourism despite Iran war uncertainty
summary: Tourism sector shows positive momentum despite geopolitical risks from Iran conflict. Early-year results were strong, though the situation remains uncertain. New opportunities have also emerged alongside the risks.
content: Bosses say a good start to the year has been put at risk, but opportunities have also emerged.

zh.title: 尽管伊朗战争不确定性 旅游业前景向好
zh.summary: 尽管伊朗冲突带来地缘政治风险，旅游业显示出积极势头。年初成绩不俗，但局势仍存不确定性。风险之外，也出现了新机遇。

title: AI data center boom ‘stress tests’ insurers as private capital floods in
summary: Data center expansion driven by AI investment is presenting both risks and opportunities for insurers. Rapid technological advances and massive capital inflows are testing the insurance industry as private investment accelerates.
content: Rapid technological advancements and the huge sums of money flowing into the data center are posing both risks and rewards for insurers.

zh.title: AI数据中心激增对保险公司"压力测试" 私人资本涌入
zh.summary: AI投资驱动的数据中心扩张为保险公司带来风险和机遇。技术进步迅速，资本大量流入，私人投资加速，考验保险业应变能力。

title: Trump's Iran ultimatum and signals of a possible deal keep investors on tenterhooks
summary: Investors are bracing for a pivotal week in the Iran conflict, positioned for either an imminent ceasefire deal or further escalation. Trump's ultimatum and negotiation signals create binary outcomes with major market implications.
content: Investors head into what could be the most consequential week of the Iran conflict, scrambling to position for binary outcomes: an imminent deal or further escalation.

zh.title: 特朗普伊朗最后通牒及可能和谈信号令投资者坐立不安
zh.summary: 投资者为伊朗冲突关键一周做准备，可能面临即将停火或进一步升级。特朗普的最后通牒和谈判信号造成二元结果，对市场影响重大。

title: Oil prices choppy after expletive-laden Trump threat to Iran
summary: Oil prices surged above $110 per barrel following Trump's threats to Iran but retreated after reports of potential US-Iran ceasefire talks. The market remains volatile amid conflicting signals about escalation versus negotiation.
content: Brent crude rose above $110 before those gains eased after a report of US-Iran talks over a potential ceasefire.

zh.title: 特朗普威胁伊朗后油价波动
zh.summary: 在特朗普威胁伊朗后，油价一度飙升至每桶110美元以上，但随后在美伊停火谈判的报道后回落。市场在升级与谈判的相互矛盾信号中保持波动。

title: Japan, South Korea stocks open higher as investors assess Trump's Iran war comments, extended deadline
summary: Japan and South Korea stock markets opened higher as investors reacted to Trump's inflammatory social media comments regarding Iran, following a U.S. military rescue of an American airman in the region. The market movement reflects investor assessment of geopolitical tensions and policy implications.
content: In an expletive-filled social media post, Trump also vowed to bring "Hell" to the country after the U.S. forces had rescued an American airman shot down in Iran last week.

zh.title: 日本和韩国股市随着投资者评估特朗普对伊朗战争评论而走高，期限延长
zh.summary: 日本和韩国股市走高，因投资者对特朗普关于伊朗的炎症性社交媒体评论做出反应，此前美国军队在该地区救援了一名美国飞行员。市场走势反映了投资者对地缘政治紧张局势和政策影响的评估。

fr.title: Les marchés boursiers du Japon et de la Corée du Sud s'ouvrent plus haut alors que les investisseurs évaluent les commentaires de Trump sur la guerre en Iran, délai prolongé
fr.summary: Les marchés boursiers du Japon et de la Corée du Sud se sont ouverts plus haut alors que les investisseurs réagissaient aux commentaires enflammés de Trump sur les réseaux sociaux concernant l'Iran, suite au sauvetage militaire américain d'un pilote américain dans la région. Le mouvement du marché reflète l'évaluation par les investisseurs des tensions géopolitiques et des implications politiques.

de.title: Japanische und südkoreanische Aktienmärkte öffnen höher, während Investoren Trumps Iran-Kriegskommentare und verlängerte Frist bewerten
de.summary: Die Aktienmärkte in Japan und Südkorea eröffneten höher, da Investoren auf Trumps entzündliche Social-Media-Kommentare zu Iran reagierten, nachdem das US-Militär einen amerikanischen Piloten in der Region gerettet hatte. Die Marktbewegung spiegelt die Einschätzung der Investoren über geopolitische Spannungen und politische Auswirkungen wider.

es.title: Los mercados de valores de Japón y Corea del Sur abren al alza mientras los inversores evalúan los comentarios de Trump sobre la guerra en Irán, plazo extendido
es.summary: Los mercados de valores de Japón y Corea del Sur abrieron al alza mientras los inversores reaccionaban a los comentarios inflamatorios de Trump en redes sociales sobre Irán, luego del rescate militar estadounidense de un piloto estadounidense en la región. El movimiento del mercado refleja la evaluación de los inversores sobre las tensiones geopolíticas e implicaciones políticas.
